title: Family Beach Road Trip
text:
## Family Beach Road Trip

My family is taking a trip to {color} Beach, {number} hours away. We are riding in a {vehicle} with my {person} and {person}. My parents packed a cooler with {food} sandwiches, {food}, and {food}. They always {verb} us to wear {noun} and a {noun} so we don't get sunburned. During the drive, we will {verb} games like {noun} and "Count the {plural noun}." I can't wait to get there so I can go {verb ending in -ing} in the ocean and {verb} along the beach and collect {plural noun} I find in the sand.
